content: WaSpeed (waspeed.com.br): Chrome extension over WhatsApp Web. Features: Kanban CRM pipeline, contact auto-save, tags, per-contact notes/history, contact export, chatbot auto-responses, message scheduling, unlimited bulk campaigns, multi-format messages, quick-reply scripts, deal value tracking, one-click funnel creation, webhooks, ChatGPT/Bitrix24/RD Station/Pipedrive/HubSpot/Google Sheets integrations. Pricing: Free limited; Silver R$347/yr; Gold R$397/yr; 7-day refund. 40k+ users, 4.9 Chrome Web Store rating.
